Tech stack: React 18 + Vite 6, inline CSS, custom SVG charts
Deep scan complete: state management (useReducer), 35 UI components, no API/data models (client-only)
Source tree documented with 5 critical folders
Architecture doc written for single part
All supporting docs written: project-overview, component-inventory, development-guide
